text: 貴重物資運搬計画：砂漠

惑星リリーパの砂漠で、研究価値の高い
貴重な鉱石が発見された。
急ぎ持ち帰り、研究を行いたいのだが
鉱石近辺を守護するように機甲種が
徘徊していて接近できない。
アークス各員は砂漠の該当地区へと向かい
鉱石を直接回収、専用機までの運搬を頼む。

Precious ore with a high research value has been
discovered within the Desert of the planet
Lillipa. Although we would like to bring the ore
back for analysis as soon as possible, automata
roam the surrounding area as if standing guard.
ARKS operatives are hereby ordered to head to the
designated area in the Desert, find and obtain the
ore, and carry it to the provided transport craft.
